children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: The fourth Sunday in July is Parents’ Day.

children.heading: .—Recognition
children.label: b .—Recognition
children.text: All private citizens, organizations, and Federal, State, and local governmental and legislative entities are encouraged to recognize Parents’ Day through proclamations, activities, and educational efforts in furtherance of recognizing, uplifting, and supporting the role of parents in bringing up their children.
